← Get Involved
Corporate Partnership — Paid Services

Engage ODIPA
for Your Organization

A Corporate Partnership is a paid services engagement. You purchase training, certification, research sponsorship, or technical support — and receive specific deliverables in return. This is different from sponsorship.

Not what you're looking for? If you want to support ODIPA's mission in exchange for public recognition (name and logo placement), that's a Sponsorship — a separate agreement under IRC §513(i).

Request Partnership AgreementContact Partnerships Team
Available Services

What You Can Engage ODIPA For

Each service type has its own scope and deliverables. Pricing is tailored to your organization — contact us to discuss your needs and receive a quote. All engagements are governed by ODIPA's Corporate Partnership Agreement and conducted at arm's length at fair market value.

Privacy Training

Request a quote →

Live or virtual privacy training for your employees, management, or compliance team. Sessions cover CCPA/CPRA, GDPR, HIPAA, and applicable frameworks for your industry.

Deliverables
  • ✓Custom curriculum scoped to your industry and frameworks
  • ✓Facilitated session with credentialed ODIPA instructor
  • ✓Post-session resource packet for attendees
  • ✓Attendance certificate for each participant

Note: Priced per session based on group size and customization.

Privacy Certification

MOST REQUESTEDRequest a quote →

Independent third-party assessment of your organization's data practices against applicable privacy frameworks. Successful completion earns the ODIPA Trust Seal for use on your website and materials.

Deliverables
  • ✓Full gap analysis report with findings and remediation recommendations
  • ✓Two-assessor independent review panel (minimum)
  • ✓ODIPA Trust Seal license upon certification (valid 1 year)
  • ✓Annual renewal assessment available

Note: Pricing is based on organization size and number of applicable frameworks. Contact us for a quote. Certification is not a legal opinion or regulatory safe harbor. Organizations should continue working with qualified legal counsel on regulatory obligations.

Research Sponsorship

Request a quote →

Fund specific ODIPA privacy research projects of public interest. Research findings are independently determined by ODIPA and publicly released — your sponsorship supports the work, not the conclusions.

Deliverables
  • ✓Acknowledgment in published research as research sponsor
  • ✓Advance copy of published findings before public release
  • ✓Invitation to research briefing call with lead researcher

Note: ODIPA retains full editorial control. Research results are publicly released and available to all, including competitors and regulators. No exclusivity granted.

Technical Support

Request a quote →

Priority support or custom development for ODIPA's open-source privacy tools. Ideal for organizations that want tailored configurations, integrations, or accelerated assistance.

Deliverables
  • ✓Dedicated support queue access (priority response)
  • ✓Custom configuration or development per agreed scope
  • ✓Documentation for custom implementations
  • ✓Hand-off session with ODIPA technical team

Note: Open-source tools remain MIT licensed and publicly available to all users regardless of technical support engagement.

Know the Difference

Sponsorship vs. Corporate Partnership

These are two separate legal and tax relationships. Make sure you're engaging the right one.

Sponsorship →
Corporate Partnership
What you receive
Public acknowledgment only (name, logo, link)
Specific deliverables: reports, certifications, training, support
Tax treatment
IRC §513(i) qualified sponsorship payment — not a charitable contribution
Payment for services rendered — may be deductible as ordinary business expense
Agreement type
ODIPA Sponsorship Agreement
ODIPA Corporate Partnership Agreement
ODIPA's role
Acknowledges your support publicly
Delivers contracted services to your organization
Influence over ODIPA
None — recognition only
None — all services conducted at arm's length, mission-independent
Right to use ODIPA name
May state you are "an ODIPA sponsor"
Certified organizations may display the Trust Seal per Brand Guidelines
How It Works
01

Request Agreement

Contact us to receive the Corporate Partnership Agreement for your legal team to review.

02

Scope Your Engagement

We work with you to define the Statement of Work — services, deliverables, timeline, and pricing.

03

Execute & Pay

Sign the agreement and submit payment per the schedule. Engagements begin upon execution.

04

Receive Deliverables

ODIPA delivers your training, certification report, research acknowledgment, or technical output.

Before You Engage

Review the Corporate Partnership Agreement

All engagements are governed by ODIPA's Corporate Partnership Agreement — a formal services contract covering scope, deliverables, payment terms, operational independence, conflict of interest disclosure, and IP ownership. Request a copy to review with your legal team before we begin.

Request Corporate Partnership AgreementContact Partnerships Team

All engagements at fair market value · Arm's-length transactions · 501(c)(3) compliant

Organization for Digital Information Privacy & Awareness

Educating consumers and organizations about digital information privacy — advocating for practices and policies that protect people in an increasingly data-driven world.

ODIPA is funded through individual donations, corporate sponsorships, and foundation grants.

Privacy Newsletter

Privacy digest: breach alerts, new laws, research releases.

No spam, ever. Unsubscribe any time. We never sell your data. Privacy Policy
